fishbone "Top-only — Funnel conversion drop"
effect "漏斗转化下跌"

config sides = top

category acquisition "获客 Acquisition"
category activation  "激活 Activation"
category retention   "留存 Retention"
category revenue     "变现 Revenue"

acquisition : "广告 CPM 上涨"
acquisition : "SEO 排名下滑"

retention   : "推送打扰"
